title: Low FPS went straight to fallback without adaptive downgrade
symptomSlice: Performance failover watched sustained low FPS, while adaptive quality could also downgrade capable hardware too eagerly during startup warmup.
evidence: Diagnostics expose warmup state, adaptive downgrade/recovery counters, last downgrade/recovery reasons, quality source, renderer classification, and recent median/p95 policy samples; NVIDIA RTX staging evidence stabilized near 60 FPS after warmup.
fixSummary: The adaptive ladder now uses finite normal-hardware warmup, sustained median/p95 hysteresis, isolated-outlier filtering, and recovery from adaptive performance back to balanced; software renderers remain conservative and do not auto-upshift.
regressionTests: src/tests/performanceOptimization.test.ts covers warmup, sustained downgrade, recovery, conservative software renderers, user performance choices, and no-flap behavior; src/tests/performanceDiagnostics.test.ts covers expanded adaptive diagnostics.
